subject: BoxNet picking issues with UltraAuFoil grids
body:
Hello,

I'm having BoxNet picking issues when there is a considerable amount of the
UltraAuFoil grid scaffold in the images:

BoxNet seems to be missing a lot of particles. This doesn’t happen when
less gold is in the image. Any way to fix this?

Here are my CTF settings:


Thank you,

Matt
